allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ningProcess | Select-Object Id, Path }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -like '*index.ts*' -or \\$_.CommandLine -like '*tickets*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, CommandLine" 2>&1)
